headline: TNDM Stock: What to Know About Tandem's 2026 Reset
summary: Tandem Diabetes' Q1 beat, fatter margins and positive cash flow fuel its 2026 reset as it shifts more U.S. pump starts to pay-as-you-go pharmacy.
